title: Best Monitors for Working From Home in 2025
excerpt: Screen size, resolution, eye strain, and panel type — these are the monitors that get all four right for a home office setup.
description: Your monitor is what you stare at for eight-plus hours a day. The right one reduces eye strain, gives you enough screen real estate to work without constant window-juggling, and has a build quality that doesn't feel cheap on your desk. We tested monitors across size, panel type, and colour accuracy to find the best for remote work.
metaDescription: The best monitors for working from home in 2025 — 27-inch, ultrawide, 4K, and USB-C models tested for colour accuracy, eye comfort, and build quality.

products.name: Dell UltraSharp U2723QE 27" 4K USB-C
products.description: IPS Black panel with exceptional contrast for an IPS screen, factory-calibrated colour accuracy, and a single USB-C cable that charges your laptop and carries video simultaneously. The monitor for serious work.

products.name: LG 27UK850-W 27" 4K IPS
products.description: 4K clarity at a price that doesn't require a business expense form. Accurate colours, USB-C connectivity, and LG's excellent ergonomic stand. One of the best value work monitors available.

products.name: Samsung 34" Ultrawide Curved Monitor
products.description: 34 inches of ultrawide real estate that replaces a two-monitor setup. Particularly transformative for spreadsheets, video editing, and coding. The gentle curve makes the edges easier to view without turning your neck.

products.name: BenQ EW2880U 28" 4K Eye-Care Monitor
products.description: BenQ's Eye-Care technology — flicker-free backlight and low blue light mode — genuinely makes a difference after long sessions. If you consistently finish work with headaches, try this monitor for a week.
